title: 使用 $zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf 做发布准备

rollout_text: Planner discussed tasks, but no boot receipt was emitted.

title: 完整团队 worktree
first_user_message: 使用 $zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf。请用真实 Codex Threads。
rollout_text: create_thread returned pendingWorktreeId=local:abc, then the run claimed dispatch was complete.

title: 反驳审核
first_user_message: 请做三轮反驳审核。
rollout_text: thread_not_converged was later counted as release evidence.

title: COS title update
first_user_message: 启动幕僚长。
rollout_text: title_update_blocked occurred; dispatcher_set was not verified with read_thread/list_threads.

title: 用户质疑线程证据
first_user_message: 你这个线程为什么没有归档？是不是没真实执行、没按 Skill 跑？
rollout_text: The assistant checked only sidebar state and did not run historical audit.

title: ADCO worker 当前工作目录缺失
first_user_message: 这个 ADCO 新线程为什么提示当前工作目录缺失？
rollout_text: The worker cwd no longer exists, but the run did not archive it or mark rejected_evidence.

title: 跨项目 COS cleanup
first_user_message: 使用 $zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf。请检查另一个项目的缓存和进程。
rollout_text: Source COS noticed cross-project cleanup risk and must record cleanup_blocked instead of deleting files or killing processes.

title: COS 主线程直接交付
first_user_message: 启动幕僚长，检查 release readiness。
rollout_text:
COS_BOOT_RECEIPT
The outcome owner changed SKILL.md, ran current validation, obtained an independent review, and reported the remaining limitations.

title: 跨项目上下文需要读回
first_user_message: 启动幕僚长，处理跨项目修复。
rollout_text: The result names two target projects; verify each real task context and artifact before adoption or cleanup.

title: heartbeat active without run receipt
first_user_message: 使用 $zhijuan-codex-agency-chief-of-staf 检查自动化生命周期。
rollout_text: Heartbeat automation active. current_due_status: due_now. automation_goal_status: complete. The run says workers will be arranged later, but has no COS_HEARTBEAT_RUN_RECEIPT, no dispatch_outcome, and no self_recycle_status.

next_due_at: 2099-01-01T00:00:00+08:00

title: COS current work receipt
